homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is an instrumental techno track defined by a driving bassline and pulsating electronic drum beats. The energetic rhythm creates an infectious atmosphere suitable for a nightclub or rave setting.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece centers on an accordion that drives both the melody and the rhythm without any percussion accompaniment. The lively yet nostalgic mood is grounded in a realistic soundscape featuring footsteps, evoking the scene of a young tramp walking across Paris.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features an upbeat instrumental jazz piece driven by a lively melody from the saxophone, supported by piano, trumpet, bass, and acoustic drums. The cheerful rhythm creates a playful swing feel that is well-suited for comedic moments or lighthearted scenes.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a perfect example of folk-inspired acoustic music, featuring a male vocalist and a gentle, slow tempo. The acoustic guitar provides a soothing backdrop, while the violin adds a touch of melancholy to create a calm and introspective atmosphere.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: An instrumental piece driven by a steady beat features prominent violin and keyboard sounds that create a rich, dramatic texture. This medium-tempo composition evokes a strong sense of adventure and excitement, making it ideal for video game soundtracks. The interplay between the strings and keys delivers an epic feel suitable for scenes requiring wonder or awe.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This punk rock instrumental delivers a fast-paced electric guitar riff supported by a groovy bass line and energetic acoustic drumming. The track creates an aggressive, high-energy atmosphere that fits well within skate videos or action sequences.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a gentle piano melody layered over a modern synthesizer and steady electronic drum beat. The combination creates a relaxing, chill atmosphere that suits background music for settings like a café or a yoga session. While the rhythm has an engaging groove, the overall mood remains soothing rather than energetic.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
